description: You are a dialogue editor working on a film scene. The production sound mixer recorded the actor's dialogue using both a Boom mic and a Lavalier (Lav) mic. Because the boom is further away, its audio is delayed compared to the lavalier, causing phase cancellation if mixed directly. To correct this, import /home/ga/Audio/samples/narration.wav onto two tracks named 'Lav Mic' and 'Boom Mic'. Align the audio by positioning the 'Boom Mic' region at the start of the timeline (Position 0) and the 'Lav Mic' region at sample 220. Set the 'Lav Mic' fader to 0 dB and the 'Boom Mic' fader to -6 dB. Group both tracks into a 'Dialogue Sync' group with 'Edit' sharing enabled and save the session.
